name: Drunken Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes.
2. Cut each potato in half lengthwise.
3. Slice each half 1/4 inch thick.
4. Arrange the slices in a buttered 9-inch or 10-inch pie plate, overlapping the slices.
5. Pour vermouth over the potatoes and dot with butter.
6. Season generously with salt and pepper.
7. Bake at 350-375°F for about 30 minutes, until the potatoes are done.
